Test

We test here all available formatting features.

1 Inline formatting

Markdown

This bold text is bold*, but sometimes italic too**, so scratch all and drink rum from example.com then go to next section.

HTML

a-nohref a-href a-href a-href a-href abbr b bdi bdo cite $n = $x ? $a : $b data delins dfn em i kbd mark meter progress q s samp small strong xsub xsup u var 2026-12-31 12:34:56 Limonadenständebauprivatfinanzierugsgesetz Limonadenstände­bau­privat­finanzierugs­gesetz

2 Block formatting

2.1 Headings

Markdown

Heading 1

Heading 2

Heading 3

Heading 4

Heading 5
Heading 6

HTML

Heading 1

Heading 2

Heading 3

Heading 4

Heading 5
Heading 6

2.2 Quote

Markdown

Quote

HTML

Blockquote without paragraph element.

Blockquote with paragraph element.

2.3 Code

Markdown

bibbidi
bobbidi
boo

HTML

PRE. Pohanime vase sny.

2.4 Line breaks

Line One
Line Two
Line Three
Line Four
Line Five

2.5 Lists

Markdown

  • List 0
  • List 1
    • List 1.1
  • List 2
  1. List 0
  2. List 1
    1. List 1.1
  3. List 2
  • List 0
  • List 1
    1. List 1.1
  • List 2
  1. List 0
  2. List 1
    • List 1.1
  3. List 2
  • #739
  • http://example.com
  • Add delight to the experience when all tasks are complete :tada:

HTML

  • UL-1
  • UL-2
    • UL-2.1
    • UL-2.2
  • UL-3
  1. OL-1
  2. OL-2
    1. OL-2.1
    2. OL-2.2
  3. OL-3
  • MENU-1
  • MENU-2
  • MENU-2.1
  • MENU-2.2
    •
  • MENU-3
    •

    2.6 Images

    Markdown (+html wrapper)

    HTML

    2.7 Tables

    Markdown

    Column header is aligned based on whitespaces, normal cell is aligned based on the colon in header separator.

    Col1 Col2 Col 3
    ABCD 123 ABCD 123 ABCD 123
    ABCD 1 ABCD 1 ABCD 1
    ABCD 2 ABCD 2 ABCD 2
    ABCD 3 ABCD 3 ABCD 3

    HTML

    This is a table
    Col 1 Col 2.1 Col 2.2
    Hello World Universe
    Total EUR 1,234.56

    2.9 HTML-specific features

    Legend for fieldset

    Fieldset content

    Contact:
    joe@lemonade.org
    +1 (234) 567-8900
    DataList Term
    DataList Term Description
    Open/Close Details Details content (no paragraph element)
    Open/Close Details

    Details content (wrapped with paragraph element)

    漢 ( kan ) 字 ( ji )
